data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Unpaid drive time tracking (for timesheets)', but the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that drive time is tracked but unpaid, it does not provide specific details on how this is implemented or validated through the API. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided to support the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No concrete API reads or persisted state checks confirming the implementation of unpaid drive time tracking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add API endpoint for drive time tracking validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API returns accurate data on unpaid drive time for timesheets.
